business_ideas.idea: Stonks.com - live Shark Tank format where viewers can invest in startups
Cherry - browser extension showing direct booking deals vs online travel agencies
Pill Up - medication adherence reminder and sorting service for India
Campus Ink - NIL merchandise platform for college athletes and teams
Terra Shroom - automated home mushroom grow chambers with subscription supplies
DealBuilder - online marketplace to buy and sell small businesses
Field Complete - free app for plumbers/electricians with banking integration

predictions.text: Cherry will struggle as Honey already dominates travel affiliate market
Pill Up can become PillPack for India with regulatory tailwinds
Campus Ink will capture significant NCAA athlete NIL monetization opportunity
Terra Shroom hardware margins will compress, subscription play is real differentiation
